subject.name: Object Oriented Programming and Methodology
subject.title: CY-305 - Object Oriented Programming and Methodology

modules.title: Introduction to OOP & OO Thinking
topics: Introduction to Object Oriented Thinking & Object Oriented Programming
features of Object oriented paradigm– Merits and demerits of OO methodology

modules.title: Encapsulation and Data Abstraction
topics: Concept of Objects: State, Behavior & Identity of an object
Classes: identifying classes and candidates for Classes Attributes and Services

modules.title: Relationships & Inheritance
topics: Inheritance: purpose and its types, ‘is a’ relationship
Concept of interfaces and Abstract classes

modules.title: Advanced Features & Case Studies
topics: Introduction of Multi-threading and Data collections
Case study like: ATM, Library management system
